Title: Small Wine Moment
ShortDescription: Wine tasting of 4 carefully selected samples of our most popular wines, accompanied by a small cold platter.
LongDescription: Ideal for those who want to get to know our production, or are interested in a tasting for two. The tasting lasts 1-1.5 hours for 2-5 people.

Title: Wine a Bit Differently
ShortDescription: Tasting of 8 types of carefully selected wines with the winery owner, who will guide you through the world of our wines and the secrets of their production.
LongDescription: A pleasant experience is complemented by a small cold platter. The tasting lasts 2.5-3 hours for 6-9 people with a tour of the production area.

Title: Wine a Bit Differently Vol.2
ShortDescription: Tasting of 8 types of carefully selected wines, for larger groups, with the winery owner.
LongDescription: A pleasant experience is complemented by a small cold platter. The tasting lasts 2.5-3 hours for 10-15 people with a group atmosphere.

Title: Romance on a Blanket
ShortDescription: Picnic basket for 2 people with richly filled baguettes, a sweet treat, nuts, mineral water, a bottle of wine of your choice and necessary small items.
LongDescription: A romantic picnic experience for a couple with a wine of your choice. Duration by agreement, ideal for romantic moments in the vineyard.

Title: Winery Evening at Víno Pútec
ShortDescription: An exclusive evening at our winery with rental of the entire facility and tasting of 8 types of wines.
LongDescription: Enjoy the privacy and atmosphere of our winery. The package includes a welcome toast, rental of the entire facility, and a tasting of 8 types of wines with a cold platter. Price 990€ incl. VAT. A local fee of 0.50€ is charged upon arrival at the accommodation based on the actual number of guests.

Title: Winery Evening at Víno Pútec with Breakfast
FeatureImageURL: /degustacie/Vinársky večer vo Víno Pútec s raňajkami.jpg
ProductImageGallery: /degustacie/Vinársky večer vo Víno Pútec s raňajkami.jpg
ShortDescription: A complete winery experience with accommodation and breakfast for your group.
LongDescription: The package includes everything from the Winery Evening (toast, rental, tasting of 8 wines, cold platter) plus a rich breakfast. Price 1090€ incl. VAT. A local fee of 0.50€ is charged upon arrival at the accommodation based on the actual number of guests.
